config.neo4j.cypher.topic.diffusers.cpg.edges.v: WITH __value AS e MERGE (source:CPGNode {id: e.source_id}) ON CREATE SET source.placeholder = true, source.created_at = datetime() MERGE (target:CPGNode {id: e.target_id}) ON CREATE SET target.placeholder = true, target.created_at = datetime() MERGE (source)-[r:$(e.edge_type) {id: e.id}]->(target) ON CREATE SET r.created_at = datetime() SET r += e, r.updated_at = datetime()
